name: daily-brief
description: Daily flow plugin — owns /brief (today's working surface as a Cowork artifact), /process-brief (route textarea annotations to drafts, task updates, and outreach drafts), and /plan-tomorrow (calendar-first planning of the next business day). v0.3.0 cleanup pass: meetings are now read-only context cards, empty sections auto-hide, and Section 7 (end-of-day prompts) moved into cortex /end-day where reflection actually happens. Configurable via /setup-brief and /setup-plan.
